pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly downloads 1GFL.pdb from RCSB using wget.

Inspection of the 1GFL.pdb file downloaded from RCSB reveals that the chromophore is not modeled as the non-standard residue CRO. Instead, the amino acids are modeled individually, and position 66 is TYR.
1GFL.pdb contains TYR at position 66. While not CRO, it is the central residue of the chromophore.
export_result.sh explicitly writes the evaluation JSON to this path.
export_result.sh and verifier.py check for the figure at this exact path.
export_result.sh and verifier.py check for the text report at this exact path.
verifier.py checks if len(lines) >= min_lines (default 8) for scoring.
verifier.py explicitly checks if the integers 96, 148, and 222 are found in the report.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for pymol_env gfp_chromophore_environment task by downloading the real 1GFL PDB from RCSB. Discovered a critical contradiction: the task explicitly instructs the agent to select 'non-standard residue CRO at position 66', but the downloaded 1GFL structure does not contain 'CRO' (the chromophore is modeled as individual standard amino acids, with TYR at position 66). Verified that the target contact residues (96, 148, 222) and output paths are enforced exactly as described by the verifier script.
